class.name: PlayFabGameSaves
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.game_saves[/code]. All Game Saves methods require a signed-in [PlayFabUser]. Asynchronous methods return completion [Signal] values awaited directly, while query helpers return a [PlayFabResult] whose [code]data[/code] field contains the requested Godot value.

method.name: add_user_with_ui_async
method.description: Adds the signed-in [param user] to PlayFab Game Saves and performs the initial cloud sync. Use the [code]ADD_USER_OPTION_*[/code] constants for rollback flows when needed. The completed result data contains the synced folder path, folder size, cloud-connection state, the local user id, and the PlayFab entity key. When cloud-connected, the result data also includes [code]remaining_quota[/code].

method.name: upload_with_ui_async
method.description: Uploads the local Game Saves folder for [param user]. Pass [code]true[/code] for [param release_device_as_active] when this device should stop being the active upload device after the sync completes.

method.name: set_save_description_async
method.description: Sets the short description shown by Game Saves conflict and active-device UI for the pending upload of [param user].

method.name: reset_cloud_async
method.description: Resets the cloud Game Saves state for [param user] without modifying the local save folder. This is primarily useful for development and recovery flows.

method.name: get_folder
method.description: Returns a [PlayFabResult]. On success, [code]result.data[/code] contains the Game Saves root folder [String] for [param user].

method.name: get_folder_size
method.description: Returns a [PlayFabResult]. On success, [code]result.data[/code] contains the Game Saves root folder size in bytes for [param user].

method.name: get_remaining_quota
method.description: Returns a [PlayFabResult]. On success, [code]result.data[/code] contains the remaining Game Saves cloud quota in bytes for [param user].

method.name: is_connected_to_cloud
method.description: Returns a [PlayFabResult]. On success, [code]result.data[/code] is [code]true[/code] when [param user] is still connected to the Game Saves cloud state.

constants.constant: Syncs to the most recently verified earlier cloud save instead of the latest upload when such a snapshot exists.
Restores the preserved "losing" side from the most recent conflict resolution when available.
